zh.lifeSummary: 當Rose Vernon於大約1240年出生在英國奧可福爾德雷頓時，她的父親Ralph de Vernon37歲，母親Cecilia Crew20歲。她於1267年之前與Thomas de Arden在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾布林賀爾斯特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1316年在英國斯塔福爾享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rose Vernon于大约1240年出生在英国奧可福爾德雷頓时，她的父亲Ralph de Vernon37岁，母亲Cecilia Crew20岁。她于1267年之前与Thomas de Arden在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾布林賀爾斯特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1316年在英国斯塔福爾享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: Vernon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Vernon in Eure, France, named from the Gaulish element ver(n) ‘alder’ + the Gallo-Roman locative suffix -o (genitive -ōnis).
French: habitational name from the same place as in 1 above or from any of several other places in France with the same name and etymology.

variants.name: Varnon
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Northamptonshire): variant of   Vernon  .

nameMeanings.name: Rose
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Ostensibly from the vocabulary word denoting the flower (Latin rosa). However, the name was in use throughout the Middle Ages, long before any of the other girls' names derived from flowers, which are generally of 19th-century origin. In part it may refer to the flower as a symbol of the Virgin Mary, but it seems more likely that it also has a Germanic origin, probably as a short form of various girls' names based on hros ‘horse’ or hrōd ‘fame’. The Latinate form Rohesia is commonly found in documents of the Middle Ages. As well as being a name in its own right, it is currently used as a short form of Rosemary and, less often (because of their different pronunciation), of other names beginning Ros-, such as Rosalind and Rosamund .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Rose Vernon was born about 1240, in Drayton, Oxfordshire, England, her father, Ralph de Vernon, was 37 and her mother, Cecilia Crew, was 20. She married Thomas de Arden before 1267, in Bringhurst, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died about 1316, in Staffordshire, England, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rose Vernon est née environ 1240, à Drayton, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph de Vernon, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Cecilia Crew, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas de Arden avant 1267, à Bringhurst, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1316, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rose Vernon um 1240 in Drayton, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ralph de Vernon 37 und ihre Mutter Cecilia Crew 20. Sie hat vor 1267 in Bringhurst, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom Thomas de Arden geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb um 1316 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Staffordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rose Vernon è nata il circa 1240 nel Drayton, Oxfordshire, England, sua padre, Ralph de Vernon, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Cecilia Crew, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Thomas de Arden prima del 1267, nel Bringhurst, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì circa 1316, nel Staffordshire, England, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Rose Vernonが約1240年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアドレイトンで生まれた時，父Ralph de Vernonは37歳，母Cecilia Crewは20歳であった。1267年以前にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアブリングハルストでThomas de Ardenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1316年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアで78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Rose Vernon(이)가 대략 1240년 영국 스퍼드실르 드라이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph de Vernon(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cecilia Crew(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1267년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 브링후르스트에서 Thomas de Arden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1316년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rose Vernon nasceu aproximadamente 1240, em Drayton, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph de Vernon, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Cecilia Crew, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas de Arden antes 1267, em Bringhurst, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1316, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rose Vernon родилась около 1240 г. в местности дреитон, оксфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Ralph de Vernon было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecilia Crew, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas de Arden перед 1267 г. в местности брингхурст, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла около 1316 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 78 лет.

Murió aproximadamente 1316, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 78 años.
